name: Infinitrack Trencher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>トレンチャー
desc: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 5 or lower "Infinitrack" monster in your GY, except "Infinitrack Trencher"; Special Summon that monster in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Trencher" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 5 or lower "Infinitrack" monster in your GY, except "Infinitrack Trencher"; Special Summon that monster in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Trencher" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Trencher" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
